name: The Deck of Many Things | Summon At Your Own Risk
description:
You thought it was just a silly little card game.

It wasn't.

When the first card was drawn, a sunken chest appeared in your living room.

Will you dare draw another?

Made for the 200 token challenge! Please be aware, this bot is an inanimate object, so a good chunk of the setup will rely on you to set up.

Maybe you were having a party with friends. Maybe you just like to collect old card games and curiosities. Whatever you're intentions were, the deck will probably throw a wrench in it. Draw at your own risk!

(Based on the Deck of Many Things from DnD.)

Note on public chats: Public chat access is disabled, but if you want to share your public chat, you can leave a direct link to it in the comments!

Note on bot behavior: I do my best to get the LLM to behave the way I want it to, but it doesn't always cooperate. If the bot begins speaking for you, repeating itself, messing up formatting, or acting out of character, this is because of the LLM, not the bot. You can try to mitigate these issues by rerolling, editing the messages to your liking, adjusting your temperature, or trying an advanced prompt.
creator: SnowyKitty
